description: Respond to PR review feedback: build ledger, fix items, acknowledge

steps.title: Build ledger
steps.description: Build Comment Ledger for PR {{pr_number}} in {{owner_repo}} including SonarQube quality gate status

steps.title: Fix items
steps.description: Fix ledger items marked disposition=fix for PR {{pr_number}} in {{owner_repo}} on head {{head_ref_name}}

steps.title: Commit and push fixes
steps.description: Stage all changes from fix-items, commit with message referencing PR {{pr_number}} and bead {{bead_id}}, push to {{head_ref_name}}. Verify git status is clean and branch is up to date with origin.

steps.title: Acknowledge ledger
steps.description: Reply to each review comment for PR {{pr_number}} in {{owner_repo}} with fix references and bead {{bead_id}} context
